title: Master Task Orchestration (Turborepo/Nx)
description: Implement remote caching in monorepos using tools like Turborepo or Nx to optimize CI/CD pipelines. Apply 'Affected' build logic to ensure only modified sub-graphs trigger tests and builds. Optimize CI pipeline efficiency in large repositories through advanced task orchestration techniques.
objectives: Implement remote caching in monorepos using tools like Turborepo or Nx to optimize CI/CD pipelines.
Apply 'Affected' build logic to ensure only modified sub-graphs trigger tests and builds.
Optimize CI pipeline efficiency in large repositories through advanced task orchestration techniques.
